name: Turkey Crunch
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 2-quart casserole dish with butter.
2. Combine turkey, mushrooms, celery, onion, green pepper, and pimento in the casserole dish.
3. Sprinkle poultry seasoning over the mixture.
4. In a separate bowl, blend together the mushroom soup and milk.
5. Pour the soup mixture evenly over the turkey mixture.
6. Sprinkle chow mein noodles over the top of the casserole.
7. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
